ISessionGroup Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ISessionGroup type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
Id
Returns the unique ID of this session group.
ServerSession
XsrfToken
Returns the XSRF protection token that must be supplied by the client on every request.
